scripts.=== START: with-tw: 1) `&` for parallel run 2) `tw` is last to stay alive 3) trap/wait for graceful exit
scripts.start:with-tw: trap 'kill 0' INT; npm start & npm run tw -- --watch & wait
scripts.=== STAGE: 1) `rm -r` w/o trailing slash to avoid symlink catastrophe! 2) `;` to bypass no dir errors
scripts.=== INNER: commands written so that extra arguments can be passed
scripts.dev:blades: cd ../ && __=$(npm root -g)/@anyblades/ && npm install --install-links file:${__}eleventy-blades/packages/eleventy-blades-base file:${__}eleventy-blades file:${__}blades && cd ./node_modules/@anyblades/ && rm -r ./*blades* && ln -s ${__}/*blades* ./
